tagline: Turn any break into a skill duel.

designSystem.style: Energetic sports-tech aesthetic with bold orange-red primary accents, clean card-based layouts, progress bars, and skill-tracking UI. Light mode uses warm off-whites with vibrant accent pops; dark mode uses deep charcoal tones with glowing accent highlights. Rounded corners throughout, gradient hero cards, and micro-interaction feedback on all tappable elements.

screens: Discover — Nearby rifts map with GPS-based challenge cards, daily rift tracker, filter chips by skill type
Play — Active challenge view with AR camera verification, real-time progress bar, player list, start/stop flow and completion celebration
Duels — Head-to-head challenge inbox with live/pending/completed states, invite banner, and XP rewards
Skills — Skill map with animated progress bars across Reaction, Balance, Accuracy, Agility, Stamina plus overall level card
League — Competitive leaderboard with rank changes, team weekly goal progress, season banner
Profile — User stats, earned badges, settings (location, camera, notifications), dark/light theme toggle
